# camelCase

Transform a string to `camelCase`.

## Usage

```js twoslash
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":1,"hash":"1a31876087ddc5cd25750680d7d188d93581ab6f3793f8f112899a8b587b14d2","data":""}
import { camelCase } from '@studiometa/js-toolkit/utils';

camelCase('Some String Content'); // someStringContent
```

### Params

- `string` (`string`): The string to transform.

### Return value

- `string`: The transformed string.
